description_long: This bungalow is a modern, single-story residential building surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees. The structure features a flat roof with a large green lawn area and multiple outdoor patios, some of which are partially covered. The main entrance is set back from a straight driveway that connects to a road, and there is a visible garage or carport on one side. The exterior is composed of clean lines, large windows, and a mix of concrete, glass, and metal materials. The property is enclosed by dense vegetation, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and extensive landscaping, featuring patios and a driveway leading to a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a clear view of the flat roof and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage/carport, green lawn, and dense vegetation on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the backyard, patios, and thick tree coverage, less visibility of the driveway.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the garage, driveway, and a mix of open lawn and dense landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and patio doors
